title: /kernel
summary_text: `/kernel` here should be interpreted as **“bootstrap Kernel mode now”**, not as a request to resolve requirements. In other words: activate the Kernel orchestration shape (lanes, bootstrap/health checks, receipt requirements) with the generic current-task bootstrap task, and defer goal clarification until after mode is active (if needed for implementation). Blocking ambiguities are operational only: 1. Working context is not explicitly tied to a project root; if project-local contracts are required, launch should confirm context. 2. `glm + specialist` live lane bootstrap must succeed (or fail-closed behavior applies in degraded rules), so if provider health fails, cannot claim healthy orchestration. 3. If chat `/kernel` handling is unavailable in this environment, the fallback is to route via the local adapter path (`kernel` command) rather than asking the user to clarify.
